title: Infused Amethyst
description: A mod that adds Infused Amethyst material!
body:
This mod adds a brand new "Infused Amethyst" Material.

This material can be obtained from Infused Amethyst Ores in caves, or by combining Amethyst Shard and Smooth Basalt in a smithing table.

Using this material, You can make Tools and Blocks.
Block Recipes are shown in the Wiki of this mod, Infused Amethyst Tools can be obtained by combining a tooltype with Infused Amethyst in a smithing table. For Example: Iron Sword + Infused Amethyst = Infused Amethyst Sword.

That's currently all the mod adds.
